perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a patterned flat cap, and a white t-shirt is centered in the frame, speaking enthusiastically to the camera. He is holding a black box for the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7. (2) He rotates the box to show the design and branding, then proceeds to peel off the top security sticker with a deliberate motion. (3) He opens the box and pulls out a navy blue folding smartphone. He unfolds it and shows the slim profile to the camera, gesturing with his hands to emphasize its thinness. (4) He holds the phone while continuing to speak, eventually pointing towards the viewer as he mentions his upcoming street test in New York.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic male voice begins speaking in Mandarin Chinese. (2) As the man peels the sticker, the music dips slightly to emphasize the crisp, crackling sound effect (SFX) of the adhesive being pulled. (3) The music continues at a steady pace while the speaker describes the phone's color and features. (4) The audio ends with a concluding tone as the speaker promotes his next video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "嘿 各位" (Hey everyone) - welcoming tone. (2) Decorative Text: "Galaxy Z Fold 7" - blue font identifying the product. (3) Functional Text: "要陪伴我一整年的摺疊機了" (The folding phone that will accompany me for a whole year) - expressing excitement. (4) Hook Text: "清脆的聲音啊" (A crisp sound!) - drawing attention to the unboxing audio. (5) Decorative Text: "海影藍" (Sea Shadow Blue) - identifying the specific color variant. (6) CTA Text: "紐約街頭實拍給大家看" (Shooting on New York streets for everyone) - teasing future content.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Box Showcase -> Unboxing Action -> Phone Reveal -> Outro/Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator as the sole person on screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male, glasses, flat cap with grey/white patterns, white t-shirt, beaded bracelet on right wrist, black ring on left index finger.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor setting with soft lighting, featuring a grey textured wall and a partial view of a shelf with some equipment or decor.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To unbox and provide an initial visual review of the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7, specifically highlighting its physical design, thinness, and the new color, while building anticipation for a more detailed field test in New York.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of the product and its brand logo, enthusiastic positive commentary, and a dedicated unboxing format.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature flat cap, glasses, and high-energy 'Hey everyone' (嘿 各位) greeting.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-quality audio recording to capture 'satisfying' unboxing sounds, a common trope in tech content to increase viewer engagement.
